text:
is a fictional character from the Rebuild of Evangelion film series. She is the daughter of Hikari Suzuhara and Tōji Suzuhara. Sakura Suzuhara, Kodama Horaki and Nozomi Horaki are her aunts. She is the granddaughter of Bunzaemon Horaki.

Profile

Tsubame is a chubby baby with short brown hair and rosy cheeks. She wears striped pants, a white robe with an adult size blue vest over it. An orange scarf with the remains of her vomit and saliva rests over her clothes.

History

Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time

During Rei Ayanami (tentative name)'s stay with Hikari and Toji, Tsubame took a liking to her. Rei in turn found the baby curious and helped Hikari take care of her. Upon Rei's final moments and ultimately death, Tsubame seemed to have sensed it, as it shows her starting to cry the moment Rei Ayanami (tentative name) dissolved into LCL. 

She is last seen with her parents as the waves of Failures of Infinity crashes against the barrier set inside the Village 3.

Trivia

Tsubame is named after the trains at service in the .
